name: Ava Bennett
title: Senior Data Engineer
text: Ava Bennett is a Senior Data Engineer in the Data Platform department based in Austin. She reports to Diego Ramos and works with Python, Spark, Airflow, and SQL.

name: Liam Carter
title: Machine Learning Engineer
text: Liam Carter is a Machine Learning Engineer in Applied Research based in Seattle. He reports to Priya Nair and works with Python, PyTorch, Statistics, and SQL.

name: Sofia Alvarez
title: Frontend Engineer
text: Sofia Alvarez is a Frontend Engineer in Product Engineering working remotely. She reports to Diego Ramos and works with TypeScript, React, CSS, and Accessibility.

name: Noah Kim
title: Site Reliability Engineer
text: Noah Kim is a Site Reliability Engineer in Infrastructure based in Austin. He reports to Priya Nair and works with Go, Kubernetes, Terraform, and Linux.

name: Maya Singh
title: Product Manager
text: Maya Singh is a Product Manager in Product Engineering based in Seattle. She reports to Helen Zhao and works on Roadmapping, Analytics, SQL, and Communication.

name: Distributed Data Processing with Spark
text: Course DATA-101 Distributed Data Processing with Spark is offered by the Internal Academy. It runs for 12 hours and covers Spark and Python.

name: Applied Deep Learning
text: Course ML-201 Applied Deep Learning is offered by the Internal Academy. It runs for 20 hours and covers PyTorch and Statistics.

name: Accessible Frontend Development
text: Course WEB-110 Accessible Frontend Development is offered by OpenCourse. It runs for 8 hours and covers React and Accessibility.

name: Kubernetes Operations
text: Course OPS-150 Kubernetes Operations is offered by OpenCourse. It runs for 16 hours and covers Kubernetes and Terraform.
Ava Bennett completed course DATA-101 Distributed Data Processing with Spark on 2025-03-14 with a score of 92.
Liam Carter completed course ML-201 Applied Deep Learning on 2025-04-02 with a score of 88.
Sofia Alvarez completed course WEB-110 Accessible Frontend Development on 2025-02-20 with a score of 95.
Noah Kim completed course OPS-150 Kubernetes Operations on 2025-05-09 with a score of 90.
Ava Bennett completed course ML-201 Applied Deep Learning on 2025-05-18 with a score of 84.

name: Certified Kubernetes Administrator
text: Noah Kim holds the Certified Kubernetes Administrator certification issued by the Cloud Native Foundation on 2025-06-01, expiring 2028-06-01.

name: Deep Learning Specialization
text: Liam Carter holds the Deep Learning Specialization certification issued by OpenCourse on 2025-04-15 with no expiry.
